subcodes.first_line: God consoles you as a token of His grace, and He is, in truth, the Comforter, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise
subcodes.first_line_orig: یعزیکم الله بفضل من عنده انه لهو المعزی العلیم الحکیم لا تحزن فی ابیک انه صعد الی الله
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @soul; spirit after death, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
